programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: (PG) The ALDC team heads to nationals, with three solos going head-to-head for the title. Tensions reach a boiling point when Abby is confronted with the ALDC's big rival Studio 19.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: Young dancers train and compete under a demanding coach while striving for success in elite competitions. Their mothers clash over favoritism, pressure, and their children’s roles within the team. Intense rehearsals, rivalries, and emotional conflicts drive drama on and off the stage.

programme.title: Dance Moms: Episode
programme.desc: Young dancers train and compete under a demanding coach while striving for success in elite competitions. Their mothers clash over favoritism, pressure, and their children’s roles within the team. Intense rehearsals, rivalries, and emotional conflicts drive drama on and off the stage.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.sub-title: Season Special - Unseen Dances, Untold Stories
programme.desc: (PG) Watch some never before seen dances and see the explosive drama unfold from Season 8. Learn new things about your favorite dancers and moms in this Dance Moms special.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.sub-title: Season Special - Greatest Groups of All Time
programme.desc: Young dancers train and compete under a demanding coach while striving for success in elite competitions. Their mothers clash over favoritism, pressure, and their children’s roles within the team. Intense rehearsals, rivalries, and emotional conflicts drive drama on and off the stage.

programme.desc: Young dancers train and compete under a demanding coach while striving for success in elite competitions.
